blocks.text: James Keller, with Jason Torres and Brenda Rodriguez copied:

Thanks for the receivables and payables extracts that came through this week; that fills most of the gap left from our last exchange. Brenda Rodriguez has started the aging on the receivables, and so far the useful thing to report is only that the file is clean enough to work from, which this early is worth as much as any finding. Nothing in the early cut changes the plan we set at kickoff. I am pulling the sector background in parallel, so that once we have numbers we can say whether Walker-Murray sits where its peers do or somewhere that needs explaining.

The one item still outstanding is the inventory movement history. We have the closing balances, but not how they were reached month to month, and it is the movement rather than the level that tells us how much of the inventory is covering real swings in demand. We can begin on the receivables and payables while that comes together, so it is not holding anything up yet, but the inventory read is on the path to the first working session. If your team can send the last full year of movements by item by the end of next week, we stay on schedule. Nothing else is needed from you today.

Jason Torres will be with your group for the first working session once a time is confirmed, and I am keeping the request log current so that nothing on {{fact:f:E-2013-001.client}} gets chased twice or slips between us.
